repair_summary: Fixed ModuleNotFoundError by writing reaction_utils.py to disk and ensuring the current directory is in sys.path. The parse_reaction_file function is also defined in the global scope for immediate use. The implementation handles TSV with optional compartment and YAML with extra fields, empty files, and missing required fields.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must parse the modified TSV file and output reaction dicts that include compartment if present, default to None otherwise.
Scaled executable cases must parse the enriched YAML file and output reaction dicts with only id and equation fields.
Scaled executable cases must pass all new structure and edge-case tests.
